FROM employees e;

generated sql:

FROM customers c;

generated sql:

  p."MSRP"
FROM 
  products p;

question: List order numbers
generated sql:
SELECT o."orderNumber"
FROM orders o;

question: Get orders with customer names
generated sql:
SELECT 
  o.*,
  c."customerName"
FROM 
  orders o
INNER JOIN 
  customers c ON o."customerNumber" = c."customerNumber";

question: Get employees with office city
generated sql:
SELECT 
  e."lastName", 
  e."firstName", 
  o."city"
FROM 
  employees e
INNER JOIN 
  offices o ON e."officeCode" = o."officeCode";

question: Get payments with customer names
generated sql:
SELECT 
  p."customerNumber",
  p."checkNumber",
  p."paymentDate",
  p."amount",
  c."customerName"
FROM 
  payments p
INNER JOIN 
  customers c ON p."customerNumber" = c."customerNumber";

question: Get order details with product names
generated sql:
SELECT 
  od."orderNumber",
  od."productCode",
  od."quantityOrdered",
  od."priceEach",
  p."productName"
FROM 
  orderdetails od
INNER JOIN 
  products p ON od."productCode" = p."productCode";

question: Get products with product line description
generated sql:
SELECT 
  p."productCode",
  p."productName",
  pl."textDescription"
FROM 
  products p
INNER JOIN 
  productlines pl ON p."productLine" = pl."productLine";

question: Get customers with sales rep names
generated sql:
SELECT 
  c."customerName", 
  e."lastName", 
  e."firstName"
FROM 
  customers c
INNER JOIN 
  employees e ON c."salesRepEmployeeNumber" = e."employeeNumber";

question: Get orders with customer city
generated sql:
SELECT 
  o.*,
  c."city"
FROM 
  orders o
INNER JOIN 
  customers c ON o."customerNumber" = c."customerNumber";

question: Get employees and their manager
generated sql:
SELECT 
  e1."employeeNumber",
  e1."lastName",
  e1."firstName",
  e1."reportsTo",
  e2."lastName" AS "managerLastName",
  e2."firstName" AS "managerFirstName"
FROM 
  employees e1
  LEFT JOIN employees e2 ON e1."reportsTo" = e2."employeeNumber";

question: Get orderdetails with product vendor
generated sql:
SELECT 
  od."orderNumber",
  od."productCode",
  od."quantityOrdered",
  od."priceEach",
  od."orderLineNumber",
  p."productVendor"
FROM 
  orderdetails od
INNER JOIN 
  products p ON od."productCode" = p."productCode";

question: Get payments with customer country
generated sql:
SELECT 
  p.*,
  c."country"
FROM 
  payments p
INNER JOIN 
  customers c ON p."customerNumber" = c."customerNumber";

question: Count customers per country
generated sql:
SELECT 
  c."country", 
  COUNT(c."customerNumber")
FROM 
  customers c
GROUP BY 
  c."country";

question: Total payments per customer
generated sql:
SELECT 
  c."customerName", 
  SUM(p."amount") 
FROM 
  customers c 
  INNER JOIN payments p ON c."customerNumber" = p."customerNumber" 
GROUP BY 
  c."customerName";

question: Number of orders per status
generated sql:
SELECT 
  o."status", 
  COUNT(*) 
FROM 
  orders o 
GROUP BY 
  o."status";

question: Products per product line
generated sql:
SELECT 
  pl."productLine", 
  p."productName"
FROM 
  products p
INNER JOIN 
  productlines pl ON p."productLine" = pl."productLine";

question: Employees per office
generated sql:
SELECT 
  o."officeCode",
  o."city",
  e."firstName",
  e."lastName"
FROM 
  employees e
INNER JOIN 
  offices o ON e."officeCode" = o."officeCode";

question: Total stock per product vendor
generated sql:
SELECT 
  p."productVendor", 
  SUM(p."quantityInStock") 
FROM 
  products p 
GROUP BY 
  p."productVendor";

question: Average buy price per product line
generated sql:
SELECT 
  p."productLine", 
  AVG(p."buyPrice") AS "averageBuyPrice"
FROM 
  products p
GROUP BY 
  p."productLine";

question: Orders per customer
generated sql:
SELECT 
  c."customerName", 
  COUNT(o."orderNumber")
FROM 
  customers c
INNER JOIN 
  orders o ON c."customerNumber" = o."customerNumber"
GROUP BY 
  c."customerName"

question: Max MSRP per product line
generated sql:
SELECT 
  p."productLine", 
  MAX(p."MSRP") AS "max_msrp"
FROM 
  products p
GROUP BY 
  p."productLine"

question: Min buy price per vendor
generated sql:
SELECT 
  p."productVendor", 
  MIN(p."buyPrice") AS "min_buy_price"
FROM 
  products p
GROUP BY 
  p."productVendor"
